# Corvyx — AI Career Platform
# https://corvyx.app

Corvyx is an AI-powered career platform that helps job seekers build
professional resumes, check them against ATS filters, prepare for
interviews, track job applications, optimize their LinkedIn profile, and
get AI career coaching.

## What Corvyx does

- AI Resume Builder: Conversational AI that builds your resume through
  natural dialogue, with live preview and PDF/DOCX export
- ATS Resume Checker: Scores resumes against job descriptions and
  identifies missing keywords that prevent ATS systems from shortlisting
  them
- Resume Tailoring: Rewrites your resume to match a specific job
  description without fabricating experience
- Cover Letter Generator: Produces tailored cover letters from your
  resume and a target job description
- Interview Preparation: Generates role-specific interview questions,
  evaluates your answers with AI feedback, and tracks progress over
  sessions
- LinkedIn Optimizer: Rewrites your headline, About section, and
  experience bullets to improve recruiter search visibility
- AI Career Coach: Ongoing chat-based career coaching
- Job Application Tracker: Kanban board tracking every application
  through Wishlist, Applied, Interview, and Offer stages
- Job Search: Real job listings with one-click add to the tracker and
  instant resume tailoring for any listing
- Career Portfolio: Public profile page showcasing resumes, skills, and
  career highlights
- Template Marketplace: Free and premium resume templates

## Pricing

- Free: 3 resumes, 2 templates, basic ATS scoring, 5 AI messages/day
- Professional ($9/month): 10 resumes, all templates, full ATS analysis,
  cover letters, job tracker, interview prep, job search
- Premium ($19/month): unlimited resumes and AI usage, plus the LinkedIn
  optimizer and AI career coach

Pricing is managed in-app and may change; treat the figures above as
indicative rather than a live price feed.
